items.title: Tax Condensed Milk Under Budget 2027: Galen Centre
items.summary: The Galen Centre wants condensed milk and sweetened creamer to be taxed under Budget 2027, suggesting a tiered excise tax structure based on sugar content per 100g. The new tax should apply not just to retail sales, but also bulk supply by restaurants. The post Tax Condensed Milk Under Budget 2027: Galen Centre appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Doctors Ask If HLP Subspecialty Training Sacrificed Under Budget Cuts
items.summary: Doctors are asking MOH if the annual HLP subspecialty training intake for 2026 has been cancelled or postponed due to budget cuts. Applicants are left in limbo because results are still not out, three weeks ahead of the traditional July 1 commencement. The post Doctors Ask If HLP Subspecialty Training Sacrificed Under Budget Cuts appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Hidden Cost Of Celebration — Dr Nur ’Athira Faisal Sabri
items.summary: The true spirit of celebration has never been about what we can afford to show. It has always been about the people we share it with. The post The Hidden Cost Of Celebration — Dr Nur ’Athira Faisal Sabri appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Over 37,000 Sign Petition Against Health, Education Spending Cuts
items.summary: MyWatch's petition against health and education spending cuts has gained over 37,000 signatures. The petition demands ending blanket fuel subsidies, abolishing multiple pensions for politicians, and removing perks from lawmakers and elite civil servants. The post Over 37,000 Sign Petition Against Health, Education Spending Cuts appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: How To Staff New PJ Hospital Amid Shortages? Asks MMA
items.summary: MMA questions how a new PJ Hospital can be staffed amid health workforce shortages, suggesting instead that the MOH expand its hospital services outsourcing programme to private hospitals, besides increasing funding for digitalisation. The post How To Staff New PJ Hospital Amid Shortages? Asks MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Don’t Appeal Court Ruling On Nicotine: Health Groups
items.summary: Ahead of a June 15 deadline, two groups tell MOH not to appeal a High Court verdict restoring liquid nicotine as a poison. MyWatch says the court decision gives the government an opportunity to ban nicotine vape retail sales. MMI moots prescription-only. The post Don’t Appeal Court Ruling On Nicotine: Health Groups appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Deadly Dance: Why Beating RSV Means Also Fighting Pneumococcus — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail & Dr Cheang Hon Kit
items.summary: Optimal control of childhood respiratory disease will not come from targeting RSV or pneumococcus alone, but both simultaneously. The post The Deadly Dance: Why Beating RSV Means Also Fighting Pneumococcus — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail & Dr Cheang Hon Kit appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: SG Lim Reaches NCSM KL In 2,200km Run For Cancer
items.summary: SG Lim handed over the Relay for Life torch at NCSM KL during its 60th anniversary as part of his 2,200km nationwide Run for Gold cancer campaign. The 66-year-old Penang-born runner has covered 1,781km across the country so far in memory of his late wife. The post SG Lim Reaches NCSM KL In 2,200km Run For Cancer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Prioritising Local Excellence In Pharmacy Education — Assoc Prof Chan Siok Yee
items.summary: If we expect Malaysian universities to clear a high bar to offer pharmacy education, which we do, the same standard of evidence should be required for any overseas programme seeking a place on the recognised list. This isn't protectionism, but consistency. The post Prioritising Local Excellence In Pharmacy Education — Assoc Prof Chan Siok Yee appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Would Aborting Pregnancy After Down Syndrome Diagnosis Spark Outrage In East Asia? — Dr Alexis Heng Boon Chin
items.summary: Jesse Ridgway and his wife's decision to abort their pregnancy after prenatal testing confirmed the foetus had Trisomy 21 triggered massive outrage in the US. But in East Asia, bringing a severely disabled child into the world may be seen as irresponsible. The post Would Aborting Pregnancy After Down Syndrome Diagnosis Spark Outrage In East Asia? — Dr Alexis Heng Boon Chin appeared first on CodeBlue .
